sections.paragraph:
Original: צלעה צלע

Transliteration: tsêlâ‛ tsal‛âh

Phonetic: tsay-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. side, rib, beam
    1. rib (of man)
    2. rib (of hill, ridge, etc)
    3. side-chambers or cells (of temple structure)
    4. rib, plank, board (of cedar or fir)
    5. leaves (of door)
    6. side (of ark)

Origin: from H6760

TWOT entry: 1924a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
